case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. ANTONIO YOSIMAR ARVIZU CARDENAS

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: GRANTED [SC-105 REQUEST: DISMISSAL WAS GRANTED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE REQUEST IS TO DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE]

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT ANGEL GARCIA LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ANTONIO YOSIMAR ARVIZU CARDENAS IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,106.71 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ARVIZU CARDENAS, ANTONIO YOSIMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PER COURT ORDER (SC-105A) ISSUED: MAY 11, 2021.
